descriptions: Grupo Bravo formed an alliance with Grupo Operativo Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: el cual pactó una alianza con una célula de Los Zetas llamada "Grupo Operativo Zetas".

descriptions: Grupo Operativo Zeta is a faction of Los Zetas that allied with the Cartel del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: alianza entre dos facciones del cártel de los Zetas y El Cártel del Golfo, Grupo Operativo Zeta

descriptions: Cross Atlantic Piru is listed as a rival of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cross Atlantic Piru

descriptions: Degraw St Boys was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers allowed the president of Savage Sisters to attend the peace meeting.
edges.evidence_quote: Only two women were permitted inside—the presidents of the all-girl gangs, the Alley Cats and the Savage Sisters—and they were seated in the last row, behind the warlords.

Barrow Gang.description: The Barrow Gang was an American criminal group active from 1932 to 1934, led by Clyde Barrow and including Bonnie Parker. They robbed banks, stores, and gas stations across the Central United States during the Great Depression, killing at least nine police officers. The gang gained national notoriety during the 'public enemy era'.

descriptions: Newton Gang members provided shelter to the Barrow Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: After the April 6, 1934, murder of Constable Cal Campbell by Clyde Barrow and Henry Methvin in Commerce, Oklahoma, Joe and Willis Newton allowed the Barrow Gang to hide out in a house they owned in Tulsa.

descriptions: Al-Nusra cooperated with Al-Fajr Islamic Movement in attacking a Syrian air defense base.
edges.evidence_quote: In the air defence base assault they reportedly destroyed buildings and sabotaged radar and rockets after over-running the base in co-operation with Al-Fajr Islamic Movement and a group of Chechen fighters.

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa
descriptions: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was a former affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa (merged with Al-Mulathameen to form Al-Mourabitoun in 2013)

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa
descriptions: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa is a splinter group from AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 2011, the splinter group Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was founded in order to spread jihadi activities further into West Africa. Their military leader is Omar Ould Hamaha, a former AQIM fighter.

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa
descriptions: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was an ally of Boko Haram from 2012 to 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa (2012–2013)

Chaldean mafia.description: The Chaldean mafia is a collective of criminal organizations composed of Chaldeans that emerged in the United States during the 1980s. It is active primarily in Detroit, as well as San Diego and Phoenix. The groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery. The organization was founded by Louis Akrawi, known as the 'Godfather of the Chaldean Mafia', who fled Iraq in 1968.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Chaldean mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... African-American mob, Armenian mafia, Chaldean mafia, Corsican mafia, Dixie Mafia, Greek mafia, Jewish-American mob, Lebanese mafia, Mexican Mafia, Russian mafia, Serbian mafia, various motorcycle gangs (such as the Hells Angels, Outlaws, and Pagan's), various street gangs (such as the Bloods, Crips, and Latin Kings)

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is allied with the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia has links to the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Chaldean organized crime groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery, with links to the Detroit Partnership of the American Mafia , the Sinaloa Cartel and the Mexican Mafia .

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is allied with the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia has links to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Chaldean organized crime groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery, with links to the Detroit Partnership of the American Mafia , the Sinaloa Cartel and the Mexican Mafia .

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is allied with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia has links to the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Chaldean organized crime groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery, with links to the Detroit Partnership of the American Mafia , the Sinaloa Cartel and the Mexican Mafia .

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is listed as an ally of the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chaldean mafia

Clan Gallo-Cavalieri.description: The Clan Gallo-Cavalieri is a Camorra clan based in Torre Annunziata, Italy, founded in the mid-1970s by Enrico Gallo and Pasquale Gallo. It is considered one of the richest, most powerful, and most violent Camorra clans. The clan was historically opposed to the Gionta clan, leading to a bloody feud. After Enrico Gallo's death in 1985, Pasquale Gallo led the clan in a war against Valentino Gionta, which ended through the intervention of Salvatore Riina.

descriptions: Di Giovine collaborated with the Gallo clan for drug importation.
edges.evidence_quote: L'importazione di sostanze stupefacenti avviene in collaborazione con il clan camorrista dei Gallo di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri and Gionta clans have been in a faida since 1990, with periods of truce and resurgence.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Gallo-Cavalieri e i Gionta : combattuta tra il clan Gionta e il clan Gallo-Cavalieri di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri clan opposed the Gionta clan, leading to a bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Si è per lungo tempo opposto al clan Gionta , generando una sanguinosa faida che ha portato a diversi ammazzati.

descriptions: The feud between the Gallo-Cavalieri and Gionta clans reopened in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'estate del 2006 l'omicidio di Natale Scarpa ... riapre la faida tra i due clan

descriptions: A peace agreement was made between the Gallo and Gionta clans.
edges.evidence_quote: La guerra ebbe termine grazie all'intervento di Salvatore Riina , il quale venne direttamente da Palermo facendo stipulare un accordo di pace tra Gionta-Gallo.

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri clan joined the Nuova Famiglia to fight Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: confluiti a pieno organico nella Nuova Famiglia per combattere Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Clan Gionta clashed with the Gallo clan in 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: sei omicidi rivelano lo scontro dei Gionta con il clan Gallo

descriptions: Gallo clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Gallo

descriptions: The two gangs were involved in a shootout that killed a bystander.
edges.evidence_quote: 11-year-old Ephraim Brown was killed by a stray bullet to the neck during a gang shootout, allegedly involving the Five Point Generalz and rival gang the Baghdad Crew

descriptions: ShadowCrew admin Brett Johnson was embedded as admin on CardersMarket.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him ... as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

descriptions: Los Chapitos are believed responsible for killing Rugrats members.
edges.evidence_quote: On 6 January 2025, two bodies reportedly belonging to the Rugrats, an MF-aligned group, were left with narcomessages beside the letras monument in Costa Rica, Sinaloa, with Los Chapitos believed to be responsible.

'Ndrina Fazzari.description: The Fazzari are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta originating from Taurianova, Calabria, with operations in Lombardy, Piedmont, Lazio, Liguria, Australia, and France. They are involved in drug trafficking, illegal waste disposal, vote-buying, and kidnappings. The group is closely allied with the Gullace family and in conflict with the Facchineri family. They have been targeted by anti-mafia operations including 'Saggezza'.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan, through Fazzari members, approached the historical 'Ndrangheta families of San Luca.
edges.evidence_quote: tramite esponenti della famiglia Fazzari si sono avvicinati a storiche famiglie di 'Ndrangheta di San Luca (RC)

descriptions: The Fazzari family is in open conflict with the Facchineri family.
edges.evidence_quote: la pone in aperto contrasto con la famiglia Facchineri

descriptions: The Fazzari family is closely related to the Gullace family.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Fazzari è strettamente imparentata con la famiglia Gullace

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Spada clan in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui gli Spada

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Casamonica clan in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Casamonica

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Di Silvio clan in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Di Silvio

Black P. Stones (Jungles).description: The Jungles faction of the Black P. Stones is a Bloods-affiliated street gang based in Baldwin Village, Los Angeles. Originating in the 1960s, it became one of the largest gangs in the city, involved in drug trafficking, weapons violations, robbery, assault, and murder. The gang has been targeted by FBI and LAPD investigations, including Operation Stone Cold in 2005.

descriptions: Black P. Stones (Jungles) is a rival of 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were also allied with the Bontempo Scavo faction of the Nebrodi mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: secondo il pentito Carmelo D'Amico anche della fazione dei "Bontempo Scavo" della mafia dei Nebrodi

descriptions: Al-Quds Brigades is the armed wing of PIJ.
edges.evidence_quote: The armed wing of PIJ is Al-Quds Brigades (also known as "Saraya"), also formed in 1981

edges.target: Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq
descriptions: Badr Organization was the military wing of SCIRI.
edges.evidence_quote: The Badr Brigade, formed in 1982 and led by Iranian officers, served as the military arm of the Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq (SCIRI)

descriptions: Al-Nusra was allied with Malhama Tactical.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Malhama Tactical

'Ndrina Iona.description: The 'Ndrina Iona is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Belvedere di Spinello, Calabria, Italy. Its boss is Guirino Iona, who is detained under the 41-bis prison regime. The clan is involved in mafia association, weapons offenses, and multiple homicides.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Iona is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Iona è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Belvedere di Spinello.

descriptions: Vrenna is connected with Iona as part of the Crotone families.
edges.evidence_quote: È collegata con tutte le famiglie del crotonese come i Megna , gli Iona e i Grande Aracri .

'Ndrina Piromalli.description: The Piromalli are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioia Tauro, Calabria. According to the DIA, they are the largest and most influential organized crime group in Western Europe, with over 400 allied families and thousands of affiliates. They have been active for over a century and are among the founders of the 'Ndrangheta. Their criminal activities include international drug and arms trafficking, agricultural fraud, and infiltration of the business sector.

descriptions: Piromalli 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piromalli 'ndrina, from Gioia Tauro, named after Girolamo Piromalli;

descriptions: Piromalli, along with Mancuso, Pesce, and Bellocco, mediated peace for the Albanese in the Laureana di Borrello feud.
edges.evidence_quote: si risolve con una pace voluta dai Mancuso - Pesce - Piromalli e Bellocco

descriptions: Alvaro had links with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi are linked to Piromalli as part of the dominant group.
edges.evidence_quote: legate al gruppo dominante sull’intera piana di Gioia Tauro delle famiglie mafiose dei Piromalli e dei Molè

descriptions: Avignone allied with Piromalli in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei Piromalli

descriptions: Belfiore and Piromalli were jointly involved in a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dal distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: The Bellocco are allied with the Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: sono anche alleati con i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Bellocco and Piromalli were both targeted in the same anti-mafia operation, indicating they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Bellocco collaborated with Piromalli-Molè on port contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Pesce clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts

descriptions: The Piromalli helped the Costa in their feud against the Commisso.
edges.evidence_quote: anche con l'aiuto di cosche reggine come i Piromalli , vengono uccisi anche gli ultimi esponenti che continuavano la lotta.

descriptions: De Stefano clashed with Piromalli over port control.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro con la famiglia Piromalli , che di fatto monopolizzava il porto, ha causato l'omicidio perpetrato dagli Imerti nei confronti di Paolo De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli killed De Stefano boss Giorgio, starting conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977 disagreements about business interests emerged between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan. A hit squad headed by Giuseppe 'Peppe' Piromalli killed Giorgio De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano, indicating conflict between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: He was killed by Giuseppe Suraci, apparently out of personal vengeance, but in reality on the orders of Piromalli, who feared the rise of the De Stefanos.

descriptions: Piromalli supported the rival side (Raso-Albanese-Gullace-De Raco) against Facchineri-Varone.
edges.evidence_quote: I primi sono sostenuti anche dagli Avignone e i secondi dai Ligato- Pesce e i Piromalli .

descriptions: Mammoliti-Rugolo is allied with Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mammoliti-Rugolo è alleata dei Piromalli , Varone e dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Mammoliti-Rugolo clan is closely linked to Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mammoliti-Rugolo clan is closely linked to the Piromalli 'ndrina

descriptions: The Mancuso are allied with the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'alleanza con i ... Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: The Mancuso formed a federative pact with the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie ai loro collegamenti con le famiglie dei Piromalli e dei Pesce , con le quali stipulano un patto federativo

descriptions: Operation Tirreno revealed relations between Mancuso and Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: l'operazione "Tirreno" ... porta alla luce le relazioni con le cosche della piana di Gioia Tauro e dei Mancuso

descriptions: Mancuso is allied with Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'alleanza con i ... Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina has an alliance with Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: alliance with the Piromalli of Gioia Tauro

descriptions: The Molè were formerly allied with the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: I Molè sono una 'ndrina della piana di Gioia Tauro , un tempo alleata con i Piromalli .

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Piromalli, Mancuso, and Molè for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Pesce, Piromalli, Molè, and Alvaro were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Pesce and Piromalli were both investigated for the Scopelliti murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 21 marzo 2019 il procuratore Giuseppe Lombardo riapre l'inchiesta sull'omicidio di Antonino Scopelliti e risultano tra gli indagati Antonino Pesce (1953) insieme a ... Giuseppe Piromalli

descriptions: Pesce collaborated with Piromalli-Molè on port contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Bellocco clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts for the construction of the container terminal in the port of Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Piromalli are among the founders of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i fondatori della 'ndrangheta calabrese presenti sul territorio da più di cento anni.

descriptions: Piromalli is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli 'ndrina is one of the most powerful clans of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Piromalli had contacts with 'Ndrina Albanese for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti anche con la 'ndrina dei Raso , Gullace , e Albanese , di Cittanova e operanti in Liguria

descriptions: Piromalli and Alvaro were arrested together in operation Cent'anni di storia in 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 luglio 2008 nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia vengono arrestate 18 persone degli Alvaro, Piromalli e Molè

descriptions: Piromalli and Alvaro cooperated in money laundering and company formation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Avignone and others in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli and Avignone were targeted together in operation Gerry.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti

descriptions: Avignone 'ndrina was linked to Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º aprile 1977 avvenne l'eccidio di Razzà in cui persero la vita due carabinieri e due membri della ndrina Avignone, legati ai Piromalli

descriptions: Piromalli and Belfiore were involved together in a drug trafficking case in 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dalla distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: Piromalli and Bellocco were targeted together in operation Tallone d'Achille in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: 2002 - operazione Tallone d'Achille coordinata dalla DDA di Reggio Calabria contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Gallico

descriptions: Piromalli and Bellocco were allegedly connected in obtaining public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 ottobre 2016 si conclude l'operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Piromalli fought a feud against the Carlino in the 1950s, attempting to exterminate them.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina dei Carlino cercò di ritagliarsi una posizione all'interno della spartizione delle attività criminali della piana, ma vide immediatamente la reazione dei Piromalli i quali, dopo l'uccisione di Antonio Piromalli, fratello di Don Mommo Piromalli, iniziarono una faida a Rizziconi che vide un tentativo di sterminio dei Carlino da parte dei Piromalli.

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano were in conflict during the First 'Ndrangheta War.
edges.evidence_quote: conflicts over business interests arose between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan, contributing to the First 'Ndrangheta War

descriptions: Piromalli and Mammoliti ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano to prevent him from becoming supreme boss.
edges.evidence_quote: a decretarne l'eliminazione furono le cosche Piromalli e Mammoliti

descriptions: Piromalli had contacts with 'Ndrina Gullace for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti anche con la 'ndrina dei Raso , Gullace , e Albanese , di Cittanova e operanti in Liguria

descriptions: Piromalli (with Longo support) opposed Mammoliti for power.
edges.evidence_quote: nella lotta per il potere nella Piana di Gioia Tauro che li ha visti contrapporsi ai Mammoliti

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Mammoliti and others in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Mancuso and others in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli, Pesce, and Mancuso are involved together in agro-industry.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli clan, along with other powerful 'Ndrangheta families like the Pesce and Mancuso clans, is heavily involved in Calabria’s agro-industry

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè cooperated in money laundering and company formation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè are allied, often referred to as Piromalli-Molè clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli's are allied with their relatives of the Molè family

descriptions: Piromalli split from Molè in the 2000s, indicating a structural change.
edges.evidence_quote: Anni 2000 - Il traffico di droga e la scissione dai Molè

descriptions: Piromalli took over control from Morabito, indicating a conflict or takeover.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piromalli clan also took over the control of the Milan fruit and vegetable market from the Morabito 'ndrina

descriptions: Piromalli and Muto were involved together in rigged public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Cumbertazione che porta al sequestro di 54 imprese e 34 imprenditori riconducibili ai Piromalli, ai Muto nella figura di Angelina Corsanto, moglie di Franco Muto e ai Lanzino-Ruà

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Pesce and others in the 1970s to manage wealth and avoid war.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli and Pesce were jointly accused of international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione Vulcano nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli, Molè, Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga

descriptions: Pesce and Piromalli cooperate in transporting cocaine from Gioia Tauro port.
edges.evidence_quote: the cocaine arriving at the port is transported further by the Pesce and Piromalli clans

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Priolo through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Piromalli led the new faction opposed to Tripodo's old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo, dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Versace through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Piromalli and Aquino-Coluccio were allegedly connected in obtaining public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 ottobre 2016 si conclude l'operazione Rent che scopre la presunta contiguità di 32 persone tra cui 12 imprenditori con esponenti degli Aquino-Coluccio e dei Piromalli e dei Bellocco

descriptions: Piromalli and Capriati were involved together in illegal online betting.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Galassia ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce-Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi e a criminali pugliesi (clan Capriati e Parisi) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online

descriptions: Piromalli allied with Casamonica for money laundering and setting up companies.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Giuliano through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Piromalli and Macrì were in conflict in the First war of 'ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Prima guerra di 'ndrangheta : Combattuta tra 1974 e il 1976, scoppiò per il desiderio dei Piromalli d'entrare nel narcotraffico e rapimenti, desiderio osteggiato dal vecchio Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Piromalli led the new faction opposed to Macrì's old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo, dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano

descriptions: Piromalli had contacts with 'Ndrina Raso for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti anche con la 'ndrina dei Raso , Gullace , e Albanese , di Cittanova e operanti in Liguria

descriptions: Piromalli-Molé fought a feud with Ventre-Carlino in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli-Molé clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s

descriptions: The Serraino and Piromalli allied to plan the murder of Giorgio De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo periodo storico ci fu un'alleanza tra la famiglia Serraino e la famiglia Piromalli per progettare l'uccisione De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli and Molè helped Longo kill Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'aiuto di vecchi alleati - i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro - riuscirono ad ucciderlo

descriptions: Piromalli supported the Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone group.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mancuso , i Piromalli e i Pesce appoggiavano il primo gruppo

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Piromalli for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Cocaine shipment was destined for Piromalli, indicating cooperation with Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: destinata ai Mancuso , Pesce/Bellocco e Piromalli

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Piromalli family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: The Casamonica clan has drug trafficking ties with the Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Mi risulta che abbiano rapporti anche con importanti famiglie di 'ndrangheta, fra cui i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Commisso and Piromalli were allies against Costa in the Siderno feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Piromalli helped Commisso eliminate Costa members.
edges.evidence_quote: anche con l'aiuto di cosche reggine come i Piromalli , furono uccisi gli ultimi esponenti dei Costa

descriptions: The Piromalli 'ndrina is listed as an ally of the Commisso 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , Secondigliano Alliance Contini clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , Latin American drug cartels

descriptions: Longo supported Piromalli as old allies.
edges.evidence_quote: i Longo hanno appoggiato i Piromalli, loro vecchi alleati

descriptions: NCO had relations with the Piromalli clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo stringe i rapporti con la ' Ndrangheta , in particolare con le cosche Piromalli , De Stefano e Mammoliti .

descriptions: El infobox lista a Anti-Tren De Aragua como enemigo del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Anti-Tren De Aragua

descriptions: Fernando Pineda-Jimenez Organization is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Fernando Pineda-Jimenez Organization

Santa Monica 13.description: Mexican-American street gang based in Santa Monica, California, founded in the late 1920s as the Santa Monica Tomato Patch Gang. They are a Sureño gang known for violence, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities. The gang's primary clique is Santa Monica 17th Street (SM17). They have been allied with the Mexican Mafia and Sureños.

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 is a rival of 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 is listed as a rival of Crips in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Brotherhood, Bloods, Florencia 13, Latin Kings, People Nation, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Tiny Rascal Gang, United Blood Nation, Venice 13

descriptions: Culver City Boys are rivals with Santa Monica 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Santa Monica 13 , 18th Street Gang , Venice Shoreline Crips Venice 13

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers 18th Street gang a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers Culver City Boys a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers Grave Yard Gangster Crips a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 has been influenced by the Mexican Mafia since its creation.
edges.evidence_quote: since the creation of the Mexican Mafia in the 1950s, have been known for their violent ways

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers Sotel 13 a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 and Venice 13 are allies after a truce.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños , Venice 13 (after the truce)

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers Venice Shoreline Crips a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Venice 13 and Santa Monica 13 were rivals but later formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Venice 13's main rivals were the Santa Monica 13 and Santa Monica 17th St gangs, however they both settled a truce and formed an alliance.

descriptions: Venice 13 lists Santa Monica 13 as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lennox13 , PlayBoys Gangster Crips , Santa Monica 13 , 18th Street gang , Venice Shoreline Crips

edges.target: Famiglia di Santa Maria di Gesù
descriptions: Riina distributed extortion payments to the Santa Maria di Gesù family.
edges.evidence_quote: metà spettava a Santa Maria di Gesù (quindi ai fratelli Ignazio e Giovanbattista Pullarà e poi a Pietro Aglieri)

descriptions: Almighty Bishops are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: Bishops are a splinter faction of Latin Counts with good relations.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970, a faction broke off from the gang to be named the Bishops, who retained good relations with the Counts due to their sharing of the same bloodlines.

descriptions: The Mau Maus retaliated against the Bishops for killing one of their members.
edges.evidence_quote: Around January 1958 a member of the rival Bishop gang and a candy store owner were stabbed to death by some of the Mau Mau gang, supposedly in retaliation for the Bishops' killing of Mannie Durango

descriptions: Bishops were an initial member of the People Nation alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Among initial members to the People were the Mickey Cobras (then named the Cobra Stones), Bishops, Spanish Lords, soon after the Gaylords and the Insane South Side Popes.

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Bishops to oppose the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.

descriptions: The Vice Lords consolidated the Continental Pimps into their nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang was successfully consolidating smaller neighborhood gangs (including the Cherokees, the Morphines, the Commanches, the Continental Pimps, the Imperial Chaplains, the Clovers, the Cobras, and the Braves) into the Vice Lord Nation.
